primitives.name: storage-prune
primitives.purpose: Auto-prune repo-local substrate pressure: archive .br_recovery bloat, remove stale Beads sidecars by exact path, and archive old Jeff corpus entries.

primitives.name: beads-auto-rebuild-from-jsonl
primitives.purpose: If br doctor reports unsafe rebuildable Beads state, back up to /tmp, restore clean JSONL, remove disposable beads.db sidecars, and rerun br doctor.

primitives.name: topology-tick-refresh
primitives.purpose: Refresh topology freshness after L102 meta-rule sync and before topology-consuming gates; writes per-fire topology-tick-refresh ledger rows.

primitives.name: ntm-surface-validation-driver
primitives.purpose: Step 6 NTM surface validation dry-run: rechecks 07-VALIDATION-MATRIX.yaml shape and emits current pass/fail surface evidence without mutating the validation ledger.

primitives.name: ntm-surface-coverage-trend
primitives.purpose: Daily trend receipt for NTM wire-in measurement: appends coverage_avg by decision class to ~/.local/state/flywheel/ntm-surface-coverage-trend.jsonl.

primitives.name: dispatch-and-verify
primitives.purpose: Canonical recovery wrapper for codex-chevron-stuck-on-dispatch and dispatch-not-consumed: send dispatch via ntm send, then verify live work via activity velocity, ntm changes, or permissive pane-content delta with STUCK hysteresis.

exit_codes.1: still stuck after probe window (diagnostic dump emitted)
exit_codes.2: usage error, invalid probe mode, or missing dispatch file
